title: ApertureProps
description: A mod adding new building blocks and decorations to PortalMod
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a16d9c756eebe3943527ba90404c3347b1161f7d.png)
![separator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ffd1a009325c468c01cfc45eb49650b3463e8278.png) ![about](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/17ab3f6ffc5463b63267433f4941bb1836d97fea.png) **ApertureProps** is a small project, made to enhance the **PortalMod** experience! The main goal of this mod is to add all decorations from the **PORTAL** franchise in **Minecraft**, to create more stuff, **with more stuff!!!** ![separator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ffd1a009325c468c01cfc45eb49650b3463e8278.png) ![features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5f2d0fa7f54703b4b80a8bc1557927213d3df66a.png) This mod adds a load of new building blocks coming from **PORTAL** and **PORTAL2**, ranging from basic, to fully **functionnal blocks!** Heavy Duty Doors, Steel, Insulation, you name it, we got it!! ![separator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ffd1a009325c468c01cfc45eb49650b3463e8278.png) ###
**CAREFUL, this mod REQUIRES PortalMod to run!!**
